description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Updater: Fixed permission issue when updating in standalone reader window
- Config: Added option to disable double‑click actions
- EPUB: Fixed missing images in some EPUB files
- EPUB: Corrected formatting for book subjects
- TXT: Improved language detection when parsing TXT files
- CSS: Resolved issue where custom font colors could not be applied
- Layout: Corrected cover image width display in 'Fit' mode for list view
- Layout: Fixed unintended scrolling in reader view when highlighting text
What's Changed
- security: add updater permission for standalone reader window, closes #1710 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1712
- layout: fix cover image width in fit mode in list view by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1714
- config: add an option to disable double click, closes #1713 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1715
- epub: fix some images are not displayed in EPUBs, closes #1709 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1718
- api: production for apple iap verifier by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1719
- css: overriding book color also applies to the font elements by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1721
- txt: fix language detection when parsing TXT files, closes #1720 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1723
- refactor: unified path resolver on all platforms by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1730
- layout: fix unintended reader view scroll when highlighting, closes #1716 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1731
- chore: bump to upstream foliate-js by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1732
- release: version 0.9.69 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1733
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.68...v0.9.69
